channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build world models
item.description: AMI Labs, the new venture cofounded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after he left Meta, has raised $1.03 billion at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuati...

item.title: Use Microsoft PC Manager to Speed Up Your Windows 11 Computer
item.description: Can you really get a Windows PC running like new again? Using this free tool from Microsoft, you can get pretty close.

item.title: 8 Best Cheap Phones (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: There’s little reason to pay top dollar for a smartphone. These iPhones and Android devices—ranging from $100 to $600—stood up to WIRED’s testing.

item.title: An iPhone-hacking toolkit used by Russian spies likely came from U.S military contractor
item.description: Google found a series of hacking tools they said were used by a Russian espionage group and a cybercriminal group in China. Sources from a U.S. govern...

item.title: Whoop launches a new blood test focused on women’s health
item.description: The wearable maker is launching a new panel focused on women's health through its Whoop Labs blood testing service. It's also adding a new feature to ...

item.title: Apple now makes one in four iPhones in India: report
item.description: Apple reportedly produced 55 million units in India last year, a shift accelerated as Apple faced growing uncertainty in China.

item.title: How to Responsibly Dispose of Your Electronics (2026)
item.description: Get rid of old, broken, and unused devices—even Lightning cables—without adding to the e-waste problem.

item.title: Uzbekistan’s Uzum valuation leaps over 50% in seven months to $2.3B
item.description: Uzum now reaches 20 million users and processes $11B in payments as it expands its e-commerce and fintech ecosystem across Uzbekistan.

item.title: The Best Streaming Bundles and Streaming Deals of March 2026
item.description: Here are the current best bundles from the most popular services.

item.title: How Can a Locomotive Pull a Long Train That’s Much Heavier?
item.description: For railroads, it’s all about managing static and kinetic friction.
